reasoning: Drake has not been the top Spotify artist globally since 2018, with the title recently dominated by Taylor Swift and Bad Bunny. Taylor Swift's daily streams significantly outpace Drake's baseline, and out-competing her or The Weeknd over a full year would require a massive shift in listening habits or an unprecedented drop of highly successful Drake projects while top competitors take a severe break. Therefore, the likelihood of Drake reaching the #1 spot in 2025 is very low.
